privileged_info_summary: The task uses real images from Unsplash (photo-1558618666-fcd25c85cd64 and photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4), both in RGB mode with thousands of unique colors. The task requires converting these images to Indexed Color mode with 16 colors, which can be verified by checking PIL image mode='P' and counting palette indices. The verifier correctly detects posterization through histogram analysis showing significant color reduction from original RGB color space to the indexed palette. All technical requirements are sound and data is non-synthetic.
